header.title: CIVIC
header.subtitle: Citizens' Ideas for a Vibrant and Inclusive Community

submitProgram.title: Submit a Program
submitProgram.description: Use this form to submit your program idea to the Ontario government.
submitProgram.programNameHint: Enter a clear, descriptive name for your program
submitProgram.programDescriptionHint: Describe your program idea in detail. Include objectives, target audience, and expected outcomes.
submitProgram.programTypeHint: Select the category that best fits your program
submitProgram.submitterEmailHint: We'll send confirmation and updates to this address

validation.programNameMaxLength: Program name must be 200 characters or less
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

confirmation.title: Program Submitted Successfully
confirmation.message: Thank you for your submission. Your program idea has been received.
confirmation.step1: Our team will review your submission within 5-7 business days.
confirmation.step2: You will receive an email notification when your program is approved or if additional information is needed.
confirmation.step3: Approved programs will be considered for implementation in the next funding cycle.
confirmation.emailConfirmation: A confirmation email has been sent to
